sutta: monks to 5 persons talk is ill talk when the appropriate person is confronted of what 5 months to the faithless faith talk is evil talk to the virtueless virtue talk is evil talk to the little learner learned talk is ill talk to the mean generosity tongue is ill tongue to the foolish wisdom talk or inside talk is illegal and why monks is faith talk to the faithless ill talk amongst the faithless and faithful is stopped aroused angered upset made obstinate they show temper ill will and saltiness and why they perceive no achieving of faith in themselves and they get no joy and gladness there from therefore to the faceless faith talk is ill talk so likewise to the virtues virtue talk is ill talk to the little learner learned talk is ill-told likewise to the mean generosity talk is ill-told likewise to the foolish when wisdom talk is talked they are aroused angered upset mean obstinate they show temple will and sulkiness and why they perceive no achieving a wisdom in themselves and they get no joy and gladness there from verily monks to these 5 persons talk is ill taught when the appropriate person is confronted it's the end of the suta
